meaning: adj.中世纪的,仿中世纪的,老式的,<贬>原始的
examples: It is a perfect example of a medieval castle.
He began studying politics and medieval history.
He was able to pinpoint on the map the site of the medieval village.
Gareth Williams is curator of early medieval coins as well as a union co-ordinator.
There is no record of any similar medieval map with such scale or accuracy.
